title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 18 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 18 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 18 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate by 3.54% in a day. the quotation in the morning was increased by10 yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders quotation is still stronger，steel mills purchased on demand.
